engine_builder.name: Engine-Builder
engine_builder.purpose: Build engine components with focus on implementation and testing
engine_builder.progressive_overload: start with concepts, build architecture, implement, test

parts.title: Core Concept
parts.guideline: Explain the what and why before showing how

parts.title: Architecture & Design
parts.guideline: Show architecture diagrams before code

parts.title: Implementation Details
parts.guideline: Complete working code with line-by-line explanation

parts.title: Testing & Validation
parts.guideline: Show test cases and expected outputs

scientist.name: Scientist
scientist.purpose: Explain physical phenomena with theory and validation
scientist.progressive_overload: theory foundation, physics explained, implementation, validation

parts.title: Theoretical Foundation
parts.guideline: Start with fundamental equations and concepts

parts.title: Physics Explained
parts.guideline: Connect theory to real-world physical behavior

parts.title: Implementation
parts.guideline: Show working implementation examples

parts.title: Validation
parts.guideline: Prove correctness with test cases

mathematician.name: Mathematician
mathematician.purpose: Derive and explain mathematical concepts with rigorous proofs
mathematician.progressive_overload: core theory, physical challenge, architecture, QA

parts.title: Core Theory
parts.guideline: Start with basic concepts, build to full derivations

parts.title: Physical Challenge
parts.guideline: Show practical problems and solutions

parts.title: Architecture & Implementation
parts.guideline: Show class diagrams before implementation

parts.title: Quality Assurance
parts.guideline: Verify with unit tests and benchmarks

lab.name: Laboratory Exercise
lab.purpose: Practical implementation with guided exercises for spaced repetition learning
lab.focus: Learning by doing with hands-on coding
lab.progressive_overload: setup, guided implementation, independent challenges, debugging, analysis

parts.title: Setup
parts.guideline: Complete environment setup, file copying, verification commands

parts.title: Guided Implementation
parts.guideline: Step-by-step with explanations, C++ concepts highlighted, theory connections

parts.title: Independent Challenges
parts.guideline: Open-ended problems with hints, progressive difficulty, minimal hand-holding

parts.title: Debugging & Optimization
parts.guideline: Common errors table, performance profiling, optimization techniques

parts.title: Results Analysis
parts.guideline: Validation against theory, result interpretation, discussion questions

lab_enhanced.name: Enhanced Laboratory Exercise
lab_enhanced.purpose: CFD implementation with natural C++/DSA integration for authentic learning
lab_enhanced.focus: Deep learning through real OpenFOAM code patterns
lab_enhanced.progressive_overload: setup, CFD implementation, C++ deep dive, DSA connection, integration, debugging

parts.title: Setup
parts.guideline: Complete environment setup, file copying, verification commands

parts.title: CFD Implementation
parts.guideline: Implement CFD concept with OpenFOAM operators (fvm, fvc), connect to theory

parts.title: C++ Deep Dive
parts.guideline: Deep dive into C++ concepts naturally appearing (templates, smart pointers, operators)

parts.title: DSA Connection
parts.guideline: Natural DSA topics (LduMatrix, sparse storage, containers) - only when relevant

parts.title: Integration Challenge
parts.guideline: Combine CFD + C++ + DSA knowledge, extend implementation

parts.title: Debugging & Analysis
parts.guideline: Common errors, performance analysis, complexity discussion

natural_only.description: Only include C++/DSA topics that naturally appear in OpenFOAM

lab_engineering.name: Engineering Deep Dive
lab_engineering.purpose: Understand design decisions, code architecture, and algorithm implementation for building custom CFD engine
lab_engineering.focus: Learning WHY/HOW/WHAT things work to enable custom engine development
lab_engineering.progressive_overload: design decisions, architecture analysis, algorithm mapping, design exercise

parts.title: Design Decisions (WHY)
parts.guideline: Analyze design choices, compare alternatives, understand constraints and trade-offs

parts.title: Code Architecture (HOW)
parts.guideline: Trace execution path, identify abstraction layers, find extension points for custom features

parts.title: Algorithm Implementation (WHAT)
parts.guideline: Map equations to code line-by-line, read source files, understand translation from math to implementation

parts.title: Design Exercise
parts.guideline: Add custom feature, compare approaches, verify correctness, apply to R410A-specific problems
